---
title: "Design of a Three-story Building Using a Hybrid of Mass Ply Panel Walls with Buckling-Restrained Braces"
date: 2022-06-29
categories: [conference, mass-timber]
venue: "12th National Conference on Earthquake Engineering, Salt Lake City, UT"
description: "Design of a three-story building using mass ply panel walls with buckling-restrained braces."
---

## Event

**12th National Conference on Earthquake Engineering (12NCEE)**  
Salt Lake City, UT · June 29, 2022

## Related links

- [Research](/research.qmd)
